runners.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 1.75 lengths third but did record a slick 19.47 over the 340m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

runners.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth in a Maiden on April 3 over 340m at this track behind Anyone For You, beaten 11 lengths (20.43). Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Launceston over 278m. Last start finished 6th on April 13 over 515m at Launceston behind Don't Tell Tommy beaten 19 lengths (30.58) in a Grade 4/5. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
